name: Mexican Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 jalapeno (or as many as you like)
salt to taste (try garlic salt, too)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the tomatoes, onion, and green bell pepper.
2. Mince the garlic and chop the cilantro.
3. Squeeze the juice from half a lime (or one-fourth of a lemon).
4. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
5. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
6. Serve with fat-free chips or use on potatoes, rice, or other refrigerated items.
